_comment: Signal Configuration — Indeed Flex v1.0. Add/remove signal types for different businesses.

signal_types.name: hiring_surge
signal_types.description: Company posting significantly more jobs than baseline, especially temp/flex roles

signal_types.name: funding
signal_types.description: Company received new funding — budget available for growth/staffing

signal_types.name: leadership_change
signal_types.description: New C-suite, VP, or Director hire — especially Ops, HR, Facilities

signal_types.name: expansion
signal_types.description: Company opening new location, expanding operations, entering new market

signal_types.name: temp_job_posting
signal_types.description: Active job postings specifically for temporary, flexible, or agency workers

signal_types.name: competitor_mention
signal_types.description: Company mentions issues with current staffing provider or seeking alternatives

signal_types.name: seasonal_peak
signal_types.description: Company's industry entering known high-demand season (e.g., Q4 retail, summer hospitality)

signal_types.name: negative_news
signal_types.description: Company in financial trouble, layoffs, or restructuring — reduces priority
signal_types._note: Low weight multiplier = reduces signal score, flags risk

recency_decay.description: Linear decay from 1.0 to 0.1 over the decay period

composite_signal_score.description: Sum of weighted signals, capped and normalised
